episodes.title: PM apologises to Epstein victims over Mandelson appointment
episodes.description:
The Prime Minister apologises to Jeffrey Epstein's victims over his Peter Mandelson appointment, amid opposition calls for him to quit. Also tonight, the Scottish Government releases its latest plan to tackle child poverty, but data shows it is likely to fall short of targets.
